headline: Microsoft Azure reports record UK enterprise cloud adoption, driven by energy sector demand
summary: Microsoft's Azure platform has seen a 38% year-on-year increase in UK enterprise customers, with energy utilities representing the fastest-growing vertical. Centrica and National Grid are cited as anchor customers.

headline: AWS contract renewal delays flagged as UK procurement teams struggle with new vendor frameworks
summary: Multiple FTSE 100 organisations report difficulty renegotiating AWS Enterprise Discount Programme terms following Amazon's restructuring of its UK public sector and enterprise divisions.

headline: Google Cloud announces £500m investment in UK data centre infrastructure through 2027
summary: Alphabet subsidiary commits to expanding Google Cloud Platform capacity in the UK, including a new London-East availability zone and enhanced connectivity to existing UK South facilities.

headline: UK government publishes new critical national infrastructure cloud security guidelines
summary: NCSC and DSIT jointly release updated cloud security guidelines for CNI operators, including energy utilities. New requirements include mandatory UK-sovereign data residency for operational technology workloads.

headline: Gartner Magic Quadrant for Cloud Infrastructure: Microsoft and AWS maintain Leaders positions; Google improves Completeness of Vision
summary: Gartner's annual assessment places Microsoft Azure and AWS as co-leaders. Google Cloud Platform advances on completeness of vision driven by AI/ML tooling and improved enterprise support SLAs.

headline: Energy sector faces mounting cyber threats: three major utilities report cloud-adjacent breaches
summary: OFGEM and the National Cyber Security Centre have issued a joint advisory following a series of cyber incidents affecting cloud-hosted operational systems at UK energy companies. Threat actors linked to state-sponsored groups.

headline: ISO 27001:2022 transition deadline extended — UKAS confirms grace period to end-2026
summary: UKAS has confirmed that organisations seeking to transition their ISO 27001 certification from the 2013 to 2022 standard will have until 31 December 2026. This affects procurement certification registers.

headline: Amazon PE-backed cloud reseller acquired by private equity — AWS partner ecosystem shifts
summary: CloudPath UK, a top-10 AWS partner by UK revenue, has been acquired by Blackstone in a £280m deal. Market observers flag potential service continuity risk for enterprise customers with reseller-mediated contracts.

headline: Carbon footprint of cloud computing under scrutiny as UK utilities face net-zero pressure
summary: Environmental campaigners and institutional investors are pressing UK energy utilities to publish Scope 3 emissions from cloud services. AWS's lack of Scope 3 reporting is highlighted in the report.

headline: Microsoft Copilot for Finance goes GA — procurement workflow automation now available
summary: Microsoft has made Copilot for Finance generally available, offering procurement teams AI-assisted supplier analysis, contract review and spend analytics directly within existing M365 tooling.
